description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style shelving unit featuring a combination of wood and metal materials. The structure consists of a rectangular wooden tabletop supported by a black metal frame, with an additional lower wooden shelf for extra storage. On one side, two elevated wooden shelves are supported by vertical metal posts, providing tiered storage or display space. The open design allows for easy access from multiple sides, making it suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages. The wood surfaces have a natural finish, contrasting with the matte black metal frame for a contemporary look. The overall build appears sturdy and functional, ideal for holding various items or serving as a display or utility shelf.
description: A modern, industrial-style shelving unit with a wood tabletop, lower shelf, and two elevated side shelves supported by a black metal frame. The open, sturdy design is ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tabletop, lower shelf, and the two elevated side shelves on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the alignment of the two elevated shelves above the main surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open structure and the absence of elevated shelves on the right side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the vertical metal supports and the layered arrangement of the shelves.
